mapper.sql: id, name, description, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted
t.id, t.name, t.description, t.sort_order, t.status, t.create_time, t.update_time, t.create_by, t.update_by, IFNULL(mc.member_count, 0) AS member_count, IFNULL(cc.course_count, 0) AS course_count
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM edu_student_group t LEFT JOIN ( SELECT m.group_id, COUNT(1) AS member_count FROM edu_student_group_member m INNER JOIN edu_student s ON s.id = m.student_id AND s.deleted = 0 GROUP BY m.group_id ) mc ON mc.group_id = t.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT gc.group_id, COUNT(1) AS course_count FROM edu_student_group_course gc INNER JOIN edu_course c ON c.id = gc.course_id AND c.deleted = 0 GROUP BY gc.group_id ) cc ON cc.group_id = t.id WHERE t.deleted = 0
AND t.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.name}, '%')
AND t.status = #{query.status}
ORDER BY t.sort_order ASC, t.id ASC
SELECT FROM edu_student_group WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM edu_student_group WHERE name = #{name} AND deleted = 0

SELECT s.id, s.name AS student_name, s.student_no, s.phone, s.avatar_url AS avatar FROM edu_student_group_member m INNER JOIN edu_student s ON s.id = m.student_id AND s.deleted = 0 WHERE m.group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY m.create_time

SELECT c.id, c.name AS course_name, gc.sort_order FROM edu_student_group_course gc INNER JOIN edu_course c ON c.id = gc.course_id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE gc.group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY gc.sort_order
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_student_group_course WHERE group_id = #{groupId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_student_group_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_student_group (name, description, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_student_group SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_student_group SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE edu_student_group SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT IGNORE INTO edu_student_group_course (group_id, course_id, sort_order, create_time, create_by) VALUES
(#{groupId}, #{courseId}, 0, NOW(), #{createBy})

INSERT IGNORE INTO edu_student_group_member (group_id, student_id, create_time, create_by) VALUES
(#{groupId}, #{studentId}, NOW(), #{createBy})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_student_group_member m INNER JOIN edu_student_group g ON g.id = m.group_id AND g.deleted = 0 AND g.status = 1 INNER JOIN edu_student_group_course gc ON gc.group_id = g.id WHERE m.student_id = #{studentId} AND gc.course_id = #{courseId}
